label: safe
content:
Department of Motor Vehicles

Driver's License Renewal

You can renew your driver's license online if you meet the following requirements:

  • Your license expires within 60 days
  • You are a US citizen or permanent resident
  • You have no outstanding violations
  • Your vision test is current (within 2 years)

Required Documents

  1. Current driver's license
  2. Proof of residence (utility bill, bank statement)
  3. Social Security number

Fees

Standard renewal: $38.00

REAL ID upgrade: $30.00 additional

Processing time: 7-10 business days
